'''âj-f-f-b''' ('''kajaffeboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:macromanage|macromanage]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-f-f-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:macromanage|macromanage]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-f-f-b
|-
! Lemma
| kajaffeboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== Subject agreement ===
''Object fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thijaffeboko || jijaffeboko || shijaffeboko || kijaffeboko
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthujaffeboko || jujujaffeboko || shushujaffeboko || kukujaffeboko
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thujaffeboko || jujaffeboko || shujaffeboko || kujaffeboko
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thujaffeboko || jujaffeboko || shujaffeboko || kujaffeboko
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thejaffeboko || jejaffeboko || shejaffeboko || kejaffeboko
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothojaffeboko || jojojaffeboko || shoshojaffeboko || kokojaffeboko
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thojaffeboko || jojaffeboko || shojaffeboko || kojaffeboko
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thojaffeboko || jojaffeboko || shojaffeboko || kojaffeboko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || jaffeboko || jaffeboko || jaffeboko || jaffeboko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || jaffeboko || jaffeboko || jaffeboko || jaffeboko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || jaffeboko || jaffeboko || jaffeboko || jaffeboko
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || jaffeboko || jaffeboko || jaffeboko || jaffeboko
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thĂŠjaffeboko || jĂŠjaffeboko || shĂŠjaffeboko || kĂŠjaffeboko
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathajaffeboko || jajajaffeboko || shashajaffeboko || kakajaffeboko
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thajaffeboko || jajaffeboko || shajaffeboko || kajaffeboko
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thajaffeboko || jajaffeboko || shajaffeboko || kajaffeboko
|}
=== Object agreement ===
''Subject fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
